fast-slice.description: Default Chit development loop: Claude implements, Codex reviews, with the normal 15 minute per-call budget.

deep-review.description: Use for broad or architecture-sensitive Chit changes where the reviewer needs a 30 minute per-call budget.

codex-writer.description: Role-swapped loop for dogfooding Codex as the implementer and Claude as the reviewer.

feature-griller.description: Read-only discovery routine that inspects an idea and returns questions, risks, and a suggested first slice.
